task_completion.description: Verify that Apache OpenOffice Writer is opened and used to create the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Apache OpenOffice Writer application window is visible in the screenshots.

task_completion.description: Verify the presence of formatted headings (Heading 1 and Heading 2).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Visible text formatted as main sections (Heading 1) and subsections (Heading 2), typically larger and bolded.

task_completion.description: Verify that a Table of Contents has been inserted into the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A structured Table of Contents block with section titles and page numbers is visible in the document.

task_completion.description: Verify that tables are used in the document (e.g., for instrument specifications or IQ tests).
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least one grid-based table is visible within the document content.

task_completion.description: Verify that the document has a footer with page numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Page numbers are visible in the footer area at the bottom margin of the document pages.

task_completion.description: Verify that specific data from the JSON file is incorporated into the document.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Text mentioning 'NovaBridge Pharmaceuticals', 'Waters ACQUITY UPLC H-Class', or specific components like 'Quaternary Solvent Manager' is visible in the document.

task_completion.description: Verify that the document is saved with the correct filename.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The title bar of the OpenOffice Writer window or a save dialog shows the filename 'VAL-IQ-UPLC-2024-004.odt'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the OpenOffice Writer GUI to create and format the document.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent typing, using formatting menus, inserting tables/TOC, or interacting with dialog boxes in OpenOffice Writer, rather than running a script in the terminal to generate the file.

integrity.description: Verify that the document is formatted as a proper protocol and not just raw JSON data.
integrity.visual_evidence: The document looks like a human-readable report with sentences, paragraphs, and formatted tables, rather than just copy-pasted raw JSON brackets and key-value pairs.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The document must be an Installation Qualification (IQ) Protocol for a 'Waters ACQUITY UPLC H-Class' system at 'NovaBridge Pharmaceuticals'. It must be saved as 'VAL-IQ-UPLC-2024-004.odt'. Key visual requirements include a Table of Contents, formatted headers (H1/H2), tables (for specs or the 6 IQ tests), and a footer with page numbers.
